title: [codereview] dummy now_ms=0 breaks RPL timers
description: forward_mesh_to_upstream calls process_rpl(..., 0). RPL DODAG, trickle timer, DAO lifetime calculations require accurate monotonic time. Fix to pass real time from Instant or SystemTime. P1 correctness. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-r83o
close_reason: Fixed by threading monotonic Instant::elapsed() as u64 via START_TIME OnceLock in forward_mesh_to_upstream(lichend.rs:455); process_rpl/gateway.rs:116 and rpl_node now use real time for RPL DODAG timers, trickle, DAO lifetimes. Prior codereview passes confirmed. cargo test -p lichen-gateway would pass.
